/* Animation */

  0% { transform: translateY(0); }
  100% { transform: translateY(-50%); }
}
</style>

					<style type="bv_inline_delayed_css">
/* ===== GRID WRAPPER ===== */
.vertical-scroll-grid-2 {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
  gap: 20px;
}

.vertical-logo-scroll-1 {
  width: 100%;
  height: 450px;
  overflow: hidden;
  border-radius: 12px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
  position: relative;
}

  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
   gap: 15px;
  animation: verticalScrollUp 14s linear infinite;

  animation-play-state: paused;
}

  width: 100%;
  height: auto;
  display: block;
}

/* Animation */
@keyframes verticalScrollUp {
  0% { transform: translateY(0); }
  100% { transform: translateY(-50%); }
}

					<style type="bv_inline_delayed_css">
/* ===== GRID WRAPPER ===== */
.vertical-scroll-grid-2 {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
  gap: 20px;
}

.vertical-logo-scroll-1 {
  width: 100%;
  height: 450px;
  overflow: hidden;
  border-radius: 12px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
  position: relative;
}

  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
   gap: 15px;
  animation: verticalScrollUp 14s linear infinite;
}

  animation-play-state: paused;
}

  width: 100%;
  height: auto;
  display: block;
}

/* Animation */
@keyframes verticalScrollUp {
  0% { transform: translateY(0); }
  100% { transform: translateY(-50%); }
}

					<style type="bv_inline_delayed_css">
/* ===== GRID WRAPPER ===== */
.vertical-scroll-grid-2 {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
  gap: 20px;
}

.vertical-logo-scroll-1 {
  width: 100%;
  height: 450px;
  overflow: hidden;
  border-radius: 12px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
  position: relative;
}

  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
   gap: 15px;
  animation: verticalScrollUp 14s linear infinite;

  animation-play-state: paused;
}

  width: 100%;
  height: auto;
  display: block;
}

/* Animation */
@keyframes verticalScrollUp {
  0% { transform: translateY(0); }
  100% { transform: translateY(-50%); }
}

        let currentSlide = 0;

        function nextSlide() {

    <script type="bv_inline_delayed_js" bv_unique_id="7GbOYWL2XPZEdD6RvVvy" defer="1" data-cfasync="false" bv_inline_delayed="1" async="">(function() {
            const growthChartData = [
                { year: 2021, value: 1000, label: 'Historical', description: 'Shopify Tasks Completed' },
                { year: 2022, value: 2000, label: 'Historical', description: 'Shopify Tasks Completed' },
                { year: 2023, value: 4000, label: 'Historical', description: 'Shopify Tasks Completed' },
                { year: 2024, value: 8000, label: 'Historical', description: 'Shopify Tasks Completed' },
                { year: 2025, value: 16000, label: 'Historical', description: 'Shopify Tasks Completed' },
                { year: 2026, value: 32000, label: 'Current Year', description: 'Shopify Tasks Completed' },
                { year: 2027, value: 50000, label: 'Projected', description: 'Shopify Tasks Completed' },
                { year: 2028, value: 75000, label: 'Projected', description: 'Shopify Tasks Completed' },
                { year: 2029, value: 100000, label: 'Projected', description: 'Shopify Tasks Completed' }
            ];

            let selectedYear = 2026;
            const maxValue = Math.max(...growthChartData.map(d => d.value));

            function getBarClass(year) {
                if (year === selectedYear) return 'active';
                if (year <= 2025) return 'historical';
                return 'projected';
            }

            function getBadgeClass(label) {
                if (label === 'Historical') return 'badge-historical';
                if (label === 'Current Year') return 'badge-current';
                return 'badge-projected';
            }

            function renderChart() {
                const chartBars = document.getElementById('chartBars');
                chartBars.innerHTML = '';

                growthChartData.forEach((item, index) => {
                    const wrapper = document.createElement('div');
                    wrapper.className = 'chart-bar-wrapper';
                    wrapper.onclick = () => selectYear(item.year);

                    const bar = document.createElement('div');
                    bar.className = `chart-bar ${getBarClass(item.year)}`;
                    
                    // Fixed height increment: 50px for each year
                    const barHeight = 50 + (index * 50);
                    
                    bar.style.height = `${barHeight}px`;

                    const lines = document.createElement('div');
                    lines.className = 'chart-bar-lines';

                    bar.appendChild(lines);
                    wrapper.appendChild(bar);
                    chartBars.appendChild(wrapper);
                });
            }

            function renderYears() {
                const chartYears = document.getElementById('chartYears');
                chartYears.innerHTML = '';

                growthChartData.forEach(item => {
                    const btn = document.createElement('button');
                    btn.className = `chart-year-btn ${item.year === selectedYear ? 'active' : ''}`;
                    btn.textContent = item.year;
                    btn.onclick = () => selectYear(item.year);
                    chartYears.appendChild(btn);
                });
            }

            function renderSidebar() {
                const sidebarItems = document.getElementById('sidebarItems');
                sidebarItems.innerHTML = '';

                growthChartData.forEach(item => {
                    const itemDiv = document.createElement('button');
                    itemDiv.className = `sidebar-item ${item.year === selectedYear ? 'active' : ''}`;
                    itemDiv.onclick = () => selectYear(item.year);

                    itemDiv.innerHTML = `
                        <div class="sidebar-item-header">
                            <span class="sidebar-year">${item.year}</span>
                            <span class="sidebar-badge ${getBadgeClass(item.label)}">${item.label}</span>
                        </div>
                        <p class="sidebar-description">${item.description}</p>
                        <p class="sidebar-value">${item.value.toLocaleString()}</p>
                    `;

                    sidebarItems.appendChild(itemDiv);
                });
            }

            function scrollToActiveSidebarItem() {
                const activeSidebarItem = document.querySelector('.sidebar-item.active');
                if (activeSidebarItem) {
                    const sidebarSection = document.querySelector('.sidebar-section');
                    const itemTop = activeSidebarItem.offsetTop;
                    const itemHeight = activeSidebarItem.offsetHeight;
                    const sidebarHeight = sidebarSection.clientHeight;
                    
                    const scrollToPosition = itemTop - (sidebarHeight / 2) + (itemHeight / 2);
                    
                    sidebarSection.scrollTo({
                        top: scrollToPosition,
                        behavior: 'smooth'
                    });
                }
            }

            function selectYear(year) {
                selectedYear = year;
                renderChart();
                renderYears();
                renderSidebar();
                setTimeout(scrollToActiveSidebarItem, 50);
            }

            renderChart();
            renderYears();
            renderSidebar();
            setTimeout(scrollToActiveSidebarItem, 100);
        })();</script>
</body>

    <script type="bv_inline_delayed_js" bv_unique_id="gFR2rETY0l1AbN90n8UK" defer="1" data-cfasync="false" bv_inline_delayed="1" async="">(function() {
            // Wrap everything in IIFE to avoid conflicts
            let videoReviewCurrentSlide = 0;
            const videoReviewTotalSlides = 5;
            const videoReviewTrack = document.getElementById('carouselTrack');
            const videoReviewDots = document.querySelectorAll('.nav-dot');
            let videoReviewAutoScrollInterval;

            function videoReviewUpdateCarousel() {
                videoReviewTrack.style.transform = `translateX(-${videoReviewCurrentSlide * 100}%)`;
                videoReviewDots.forEach((dot, index) => {
                    dot.classList.toggle('active', index === videoReviewCurrentSlide);
                });
                
                // Pause all videos except current slide
                for (let i = 1; i <= videoReviewTotalSlides; i++) {
                    const video = document.getElementById(`video${i}`);
                    const playBtn = document.getElementById(`playBtn${i}`);
                    if (video && !video.paused && i !== videoReviewCurrentSlide + 1) {
                        video.pause();
                        playBtn.classList.remove('hidden');
                    }
                }
            }

            function videoReviewNextSlide() {
                videoReviewCurrentSlide = (videoReviewCurrentSlide + 1) % videoReviewTotalSlides;
                videoReviewUpdateCarousel();
            }

            function videoReviewStartAutoScroll() {
                videoReviewStopAutoScroll();
                videoReviewAutoScrollInterval = setInterval(videoReviewNextSlide, 4000);
            }

            function videoReviewStopAutoScroll() {
                if (videoReviewAutoScrollInterval) {
                    clearInterval(videoReviewAutoScrollInterval);
                }
            }

            window.goToSlide = function(index) {
                videoReviewCurrentSlide = index;
                videoReviewUpdateCarousel();
                videoReviewStartAutoScroll();
            };

            window.toggleVideoReview = function(videoNum) {
                const video = document.getElementById(`video${videoNum}`);
                const playBtn = document.getElementById(`playBtn${videoNum}`);
                
                if (video.paused) {
                    video.play();
                    playBtn.classList.add('hidden');
                    // Stop auto-scroll when video plays
                    videoReviewStopAutoScroll();
                } else {
                    video.pause();
                    playBtn.classList.remove('hidden');
                    // Resume auto-scroll when video pauses
                    videoReviewStartAutoScroll();
                }
            };

            // Video ended and pause event listeners
            for (let i = 1; i <= videoReviewTotalSlides; i++) {
                const video = document.getElementById(`video${i}`);
                const playBtn = document.getElementById(`playBtn${i}`);
                if (video && playBtn) {
                    video.addEventListener('ended', () => {
                        playBtn.classList.remove('hidden');
                        // Resume auto-scroll when video ends
                        videoReviewStartAutoScroll();
                    });

                    video.addEventListener('pause', () => {
                        playBtn.classList.remove('hidden');
                        // Resume auto-scroll when video is paused
                        videoReviewStartAutoScroll();
                    });

                    video.addEventListener('play', () => {
                        playBtn.classList.add('hidden');
                        // Stop auto-scroll when video plays
                        videoReviewStopAutoScroll();
                    });
                }
            }

            // Dot click events
            videoReviewDots.forEach((dot, index) => {
                dot.addEventListener('click', () => {
                    videoReviewCurrentSlide = index;
                    videoReviewUpdateCarousel();
                    // Restart auto-scroll after manual navigation
                    videoReviewStartAutoScroll();
                });
            });

            // Start auto-scroll initially
            videoReviewStartAutoScroll();
        })();</script>
</body>
</html>				</div>
				</div>

				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-47aaf69 elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="47aaf69" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">
					<h2 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Trusted by the Worlds Most Innovative Brands</h2>				</div>

					<style type="bv_inline_delayed_css">
/* ===== GRID WRAPPER ===== */
.vertical-scroll-grid-alt {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  gap: 15px;
}

/* ===== INDIVIDUAL SCROLL COLUMN ===== */
.vertical-logo-scroll-alt {
  width: 100%;
  height: 500px;
  overflow: hidden;
  border-radius: 12px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
  position: relative;
}

/* SCROLL TRACK */
.vertical-logo-scroll-alt .scroll-track-alt {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 15px;
  animation: verticalScrollUpAlt 18s linear infinite;
}

/* Pause on hover */
.vertical-logo-scroll-alt:hover .scroll-track-alt {
  animation-play-state: paused;
}

/* IMAGE FIX */
.vertical-logo-scroll-alt img {
  width: 100%;
  height: auto;
  display: block;
  object-fit: contain;
}

/* Animation */
@keyframes verticalScrollUpAlt {
  0% { transform: translateY(0); }
  100% { transform: translateY(-50%); }
}

/* Slightly smaller height on very small screens */
@media (max-width: 480px) {
  .vertical-logo-scroll-alt {
    height: 400px;
  }
}
</style>

			<script type="bv_inline_delayed_js" bv_unique_id="hXK8gjUp9SuNN006LYuR" defer="1" data-cfasync="false" bv_inline_delayed="1" async="">const lazyloadRunObserver = () => {
					const lazyloadBackgrounds = document.querySelectorAll( `.e-con.e-parent:not(.e-lazyloaded)` );
					const lazyloadBackgroundObserver = new IntersectionObserver( ( entries ) => {
						entries.forEach( ( entry ) => {
							if ( entry.isIntersecting ) {
								let lazyloadBackground = entry.target;
								if( lazyloadBackground ) {
									lazyloadBackground.classList.add( 'e-lazyloaded' );
								}
								lazyloadBackgroundObserver.unobserve( entry.target );
							}
						});
					}, { rootMargin: '200px 0px 200px 0px' } );
					lazyloadBackgrounds.forEach( ( lazyloadBackground ) => {
						lazyloadBackgroundObserver.observe( lazyloadBackground );
					} );
				};
				const events = [
					'DOMContentLoaded',
					'elementor/lazyload/observe',
				];
				events.forEach( ( event ) => {
					document.addEventListener( event, lazyloadRunObserver );
				} );</script>

<script id="bv-lazyload-video" data-cfasync="false" bv-exclude="true">var bv_load_video_on_user_action = true

var bv_video_lazyload_events = ["mousemove", "click", "keydown", "wheel", "touchmove", "touchend"]

var bv_video_load_event_executed = false
var bv_video_user_action_performed = false


window.addEventListener('load', () => {
  bv_video_load_event_executed = true;
  handle_lazyload_videos();
})

for (const event of bv_video_lazyload_events) {
  window.addEventListener(event, handle_video_lazyload_events, { once: true });
}

function handle_video_lazyload_events() {
  for (const event of bv_video_lazyload_events) {
    window.removeEventListener(event, handle_video_lazyload_events);
  }

  bv_video_user_action_performed = true
  handle_lazyload_videos();
}


document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
	handle_lazyload_videos()
})

function bv_set_video_element_src(element) {
	let _src = element.getAttribute('bv-data-src')
	if (_src) {
		element.setAttribute('src', _src)
	}
}

function handle_lazyload_videos() {
	if ( (!bv_load_video_on_user_action && bv_video_load_event_executed) || (bv_load_video_on_user_action && bv_video_user_action_performed && bv_video_load_event_executed) ) {

		if('IntersectionObserver' in window) {	
			function handleVideoTags(entries) {
				entries.map((entry) => {
					if (entry.isIntersecting) {
						bv_set_video_element_src(entry.target)
						video_lazy_observer.unobserve(entry.target)
					}
				})
			}

			const video_lazy_observer = new IntersectionObserver(handleVideoTags)
			let video_elements = document.querySelectorAll('.bv-lazyload-video')
			video_elements.forEach((video_element) => {
				video_lazy_observer.observe(video_element)
			})

		} else {
			let video_elements = document.querySelectorAll('.bv-lazyload-video')
			video_elements.forEach((video_element) => {
				bv_set_video_element_src(video_element)
			})
		}
	}
}
</script>
